title: Gourmet Festive Portuguese Foie Gras Terrine
description: A festive and flavorful Portuguese dish featuring foie gras, long fermentation dough, and low fat friendly ingredients, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the long fermentation dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Place the foie gras in the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border around it.
Drizzle the reduced port wine over the foie gras.
Sprinkle the chopped pickled pink peppercorns, honey, thyme, salt, and black pepper over the foie gras.
Fold the dough over the foie gras, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the terrine in a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Let the terrine cool to room temperature before serving.
Slice the terrine into 1 inch thick slices and serve.
Garnish with additional pickled pink peppercorns and thyme if desired.
